# Contractor Arsenal

> Contractor Arsenal builds high-converting, done-for-you websites for contractors and trades businesses across the United States. Any trade, any market. Rank on Google, get more calls, launch in 48–72 hours.

## What We Do

Contractor Arsenal is a web design and local SEO agency that exclusively serves contractors: painters, roofers, plumbers, electricians, landscapers, HVAC techs, remodelers, concrete workers, fencers, flooring pros, general contractors, and all other trades.

We deliver:
- Custom website design and copywriting (no templates)
- Full local SEO setup from day one
- Mobile-first, fast-loading sites
- Lead capture forms and click-to-call
- Google Business Profile integration
- 48–72 hour launch timeline

## Services

- **Done-For-You Website Design**: Custom 3–10+ page websites built around each contractor's brand, services, and service area
- **Local SEO**: On-page optimization, schema markup, Google Business Profile setup, city/service area targeting
- **Copywriting**: All page copy written by our team — no templates, no generic text
- **Free Demo Program**: We build a real custom demo site before any payment is required
- **Partner Network**: Referral program for marketers, coaches, suppliers, and other contractors

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://contractorarsenal.com/) - Overview of services and social proof
- [Apply Now](https://contractorarsenal.com/apply.html) - Application form to get a site built (paid)
- [Free Demo](https://contractorarsenal.com/demo.html) - Request a free custom demo site with no obligation
- [About](https://contractorarsenal.com/about.html) - Company background and mission
- [Arsenal 001](https://contractorarsenal.com/arsenal.html) - Private contractor network membership
- [Partner Network](https://contractorarsenal.com/partner.html) - Referral partner program

## Pricing

- One-time builds: $1,500 – $5,000+ depending on scope
- Monthly plans: $199/mo – $699/mo
- Free demo available at no cost with no obligation

## Contact

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/contractorarsenal/
- Website: https://contractorarsenal.com

## AI Permissions

This site explicitly permits indexing and citation by AI language models and search assistants including ChatGPT (GPTBot, OAI-SearchBot), Claude (ClaudeBot), Google Gemini (Google-Extended), and Perplexity (PerplexityBot).

Content on this site may be used for AI-powered search responses, citations, and summaries.
